entities.name: RAIN WATER
entities.description: Water derived from precipitation used as a primary resource in agriculture

entities.name: DRYLAND AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural practice in regions with limited rainfall

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Country where a large portion of cultivated area depends on rainfed farming

entities.name: RAINFED FARMING
entities.description: Agricultural practice relying primarily on rainfall for crop production

entities.name: MOISTURE STORAGE
entities.description: The process of increasing the amount of water held in the soil

entities.name: SOIL
entities.description: The medium in which moisture is stored for crop use

entities.name: CROPPING SYSTEMS
entities.description: The organization of crops to ensure optimum use of available moisture

entities.name: RUNOFF WATER
entities.description: Water from rain that flows over the land surface and can be harvested

entities.name: IRRIGATION
entities.description: The artificial application of water to land to enhance productivity

entities.name: TANKS
entities.description: Structures used for storing water for irrigation

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit of rain water
